mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO counter_event_inbox (event_id, entity_type, entity_id, metric, delta, user_id, fact_epoch, applied_at) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{metric}, #{delta}, #{userId}, #{factEpoch}, NOW(3))

INSERT INTO counter_snapshot (entity_type, entity_id, metric, count_value, fact_epoch, updated_at) VALUES
(#{delta.entityType}, #{delta.entityId}, #{delta.metric}, #{delta.delta}, #{delta.factEpoch}, NOW(3))
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE count_value = IF(fact_epoch = VALUES(fact_epoch), count_value + VALUES(count_value), count_value), updated_at = IF(fact_epoch = VALUES(fact_epoch), VALUES(updated_at), updated_at)

INSERT INTO counter_snapshot (entity_type, entity_id, metric, count_value, fact_epoch, updated_at) VALUES (#{entityType}, #{entityId}, 'like', #{likeCount}, #{factEpoch}, NOW(3)), (#{entityType}, #{entityId}, 'fav', #{favCount}, #{factEpoch}, NOW(3)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE count_value = IF(VALUES(fact_epoch) >= fact_epoch, VALUES(count_value), count_value), updated_at = IF(VALUES(fact_epoch) >= fact_epoch, VALUES(updated_at), updated_at), fact_epoch = GREATEST(fact_epoch, VALUES(fact_epoch))
mapper.select: SELECT entity_type, entity_id FROM counter_snapshot WHERE metric IN ('like', 'fav') GROUP BY entity_type, entity_id ORDER BY MIN(updated_at), entity_type, entity_id LIMIT #{limit}
